images.title: Sea shore at Roquebrune.jpg
images.description: Sea shore in Roquebrune-Cap-Martin, Alpes-Maritimes, France. Behind the trees, the villa E-1027.

images.title: Cabanon Le Corbusier.jpg
images.description: Cabin built by the well known French architect Le Corbusier where he spent the last years of his life, above the beach of Cap-Martin (Alpes-Maritimes, France). This photo is free of rights according freedom of panorama, because the construction is not enough original.

images.title: Villa plage de Buse.jpg
images.description: House of the housekeeper of the villa "la Casa del Mare" on the beach of Buse in Roquebrune-Cap-Martin (Alpes-Maritimes, France).

images.title: Villa plage de Buse (relief).jpg
images.description: Relief of a winged lion on a wall of the housekeeper house of the villa "La Casa Del Mare" on the beach of Buse in Roquebrune-Cap-Martin (Alpes-Maritimes, France).
